rubrics.name: States the text from Section 2.8(h) of "Synopsys Ansys merger.pdf" with all of... (ver_14672a07e51244cab810558aa097f624)

messages.content: States the text from Section 2.8(h) of "Synopsys Ansys merger.pdf" with all of the following modifications: (1) deletes the text "on the Company"; (2) replaces the term "Acquired Company" with a reference to the Seller; (3) replaces the term Company Product, Company Software, or Company Material with a reference to the Purchased Assets; and (4) replaces the term "Intellectual Property Rights" with "Intellectual Property".
